description: Set zoning conditions for deformable blocks prior to using the block zone generate-new command.

keywords.name: distance-2
keywords.description: Generate a radially graded mesh from point v . If center is inside a block, a uniform mesh with edge length of edgelength-center f will be generated. Set the edge length at a distance Distance-1 from the center point to f . Set a distance f from the center point at which edgelength-1 will be used. Set the edge length at a distance Distance-2 from the center point to f . Set a distance f from the center point at which edgelength-2 will be used.

keywords.name: clear
keywords.description: Clears all sizes specified with all \(block zone size\) commands.

keywords.name: edgelength
keywords.description: The parameter f defines the average edge length of tetrahedral zones. By default, the size is set for blocks in the range. Use the by keyword with a specified range to apply the size to gridpoints ( range by block-gridpoint ) or to faces ( range by block-bface ).

keywords.name: edgelength
keywords.description: Specify the zone size near an isolated point v inside a block. If the coordinates of an existing gridpoint are given, the command will still work, but the isolated point will not be listed with the list keyword. The parameter f defines the average edge length of tetrahedral zones near Isolated-Point .

keywords.name: list
keywords.description: Prints to the console the coordinates and edge lengths of all isolated points.
